findings.description: AI territory expansion spec_gap stagnant for 9 cycles (escalated). AI still uses basic wander-to-unseen behavior, does not prioritize high-value resource tiles or strategic chokepoints. Not a regression from this commit — the Player addressed difficulty differentiation (item 5) but territory expansion (item 3 of fix-ai-opponent-intelligence) remains unaddressed.
findings.evidence: Checkpoint .checkpoint.json spec_gaps: 'AI territory expansion still basic — no strategic resource claiming', cycles_stagnant=9, status='escalated'
